productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of fashionable leather shoes from franco leone. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperPerforated leather upper on the forefoot and midfoot, and smooth backfoot overlay for absolute comfort, breathability and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleErgonomically curved leather footbed for absolute all-day sweat-free comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with geometrical lugs on the textured forefoot and has horizontal grooves on the back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
